title: Maintain and control stocks
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain and control stocks demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Maintain and control stocks of materials or equipment

pcs.text: Label, document and store stocks in accordance with relevant standards and specific safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label, document and store stocks in accordance with relevant standards and specific safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label, document and store stocks in accordance with relevant standards and specific safety requirements.

pcs.text: Follow stock rotation procedures to maximise use of stocks within permitted shelf life
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow stock rotation procedures to maximise use of stocks within permitted shelf life?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow stock rotation procedures to maximise use of stocks within permitted shelf life.

pcs.text: Identify stock discrepancies and replace redundant or outdated stocks to maintain stocks at prescribed level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify stock discrepancies and replace redundant or outdated stocks to maintain stocks at prescribed level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify stock discrepancies and replace redundant or outdated stocks to maintain stocks at prescribed level.

pcs.text: Identify and replace damaged and/or worn equipment or arrange for repairs or disposal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and replace damaged and/or worn equipment or arrange for repairs or disposal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and replace damaged and/or worn equipment or arrange for repairs or disposal.

pcs.text: Identify and report wastage to relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report wastage to relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report wastage to relevant personnel.
